normal.label: Normal
normal.description: Normal-appearing tympanic membrane, translucent, with light reflex present

retraction_grade_i.label: Retraction grade I
retraction_grade_i.description: Mild retraction without contact with middle ear structures

retraction_grade_iii.label: Retraction grade III
retraction_grade_iii.description: Retraction contacting the promontory without bony erosion

retraction_grade_iv.label: Retraction grade IV
retraction_grade_iv.description: Retraction adherent to the promontory with possible bony erosion

retraction_as.label: Anterosuperior retraction
retraction_as.description: Retraction localized in the anterosuperior quadrant

retraction_ai.label: Anteroinferior retraction
retraction_ai.description: Retraction localized in the anteroinferior quadrant

retraction_ps.label: Posterosuperior retraction
retraction_ps.description: Retraction localized in the posterosuperior quadrant

retraction_pi.label: Posteroinferior retraction
retraction_pi.description: Retraction localized in the posteroinferior quadrant

retraction_pars_flaccida.label: Pars flaccida retraction
retraction_pars_flaccida.description: Retraction of the pars flaccida (Prussak's space)

retraction_pars_tensa.label: Pars tensa retraction
retraction_pars_tensa.description: Diffuse retraction of the pars tensa

atelectasis.label: Atelectasis
atelectasis.description: Generalized retraction of the entire tympanic membrane

perforation_central.label: Central perforation
perforation_central.description: Perforation in the central portion of the pars tensa

perforation_subtotal.label: Subtotal perforation
perforation_subtotal.description: Perforation involving most of the pars tensa

perforation_total.label: Total perforation
perforation_total.description: Complete absence of the tympanic membrane

perforation_anterior.label: Anterior perforation
perforation_anterior.description: Perforation located in the anterior half

perforation_posterior.label: Posterior perforation
perforation_posterior.description: Perforation located in the posterior half

perforation_inferior.label: Inferior perforation
perforation_inferior.description: Perforation located in the inferior portion

perforation_attic.label: Attic perforation
perforation_attic.description: Perforation localized in the pars flaccida or attic

perforation_wet.label: Wet perforation
perforation_wet.description: Perforation with active discharge or otorrhea

effusion.label: Effusion
effusion.description: Presence of fluid in the middle ear

effusion_serous.label: Serous effusion
effusion_serous.description: Clear and transparent fluid in the middle ear

effusion_mucoid.label: Mucoid effusion
effusion_mucoid.description: Thick and viscous fluid in the middle ear (glue ear)

effusion_purulent.label: Purulent effusion
effusion_purulent.description: Purulent fluid in the middle ear visible behind the membrane

air_fluid_level.label: Air-fluid level
air_fluid_level.description: Air-fluid level visible behind the tympanic membrane

air_bubbles.label: Air bubbles
air_bubbles.description: Air bubbles visible behind the tympanic membrane

hemotympanum.label: Hemotympanum
hemotympanum.description: Blood in the middle ear cavity

blue_ear.label: Blue ear
blue_ear.description: Bluish discoloration of the membrane due to chronic hemotympanum

tympanosclerosis.label: Tympanosclerosis
tympanosclerosis.description: White calcific deposits on the tympanic membrane

tympanosclerosis_focal.label: Focal tympanosclerosis
tympanosclerosis_focal.description: Localized calcific plaque in a specific area

tympanosclerosis_diffuse.label: Diffuse tympanosclerosis
tympanosclerosis_diffuse.description: Multiple calcific plaques on the membrane

calcification.label: Calcification
calcification.description: Calcified area on the tympanic membrane

hyperemia.label: Hyperemia
hyperemia.description: Vascular erythema of the tympanic membrane

edema_membrane.label: Membrane edema
edema_membrane.description: Edematous thickening of the tympanic membrane

oma_acute.label: Acute otitis media
oma_acute.description: Acute otitis media with bulging and erythematous membrane

omc_simple.label: Simple COM
omc_simple.description: Simple chronic otitis media with perforation

omc_suppurative.label: Suppurative COM
omc_suppurative.description: Chronic otitis media with active suppuration

bulging.label: Bulging
bulging.description: Convex/bulging tympanic membrane towards the exterior

bulging_diffuse.label: Diffuse bulging
bulging_diffuse.description: Generalized bulging of the entire membrane

cholesteatoma.label: Cholesteatoma
cholesteatoma.description: Keratinized epithelial mass in the middle ear

cholesteatoma_attic.label: Attic cholesteatoma
cholesteatoma_attic.description: Cholesteatoma originating in the pars flaccida

cholesteatoma_congenital.label: Congenital cholesteatoma
cholesteatoma_congenital.description: White mass behind an intact tympanic membrane

keratin_debris.label: Keratin debris
keratin_debris.description: Keratin accumulation in retraction or perforation

tube_blocked.label: Blocked tube
tube_blocked.description: Ventilation tube blocked by secretion or tissue

tube_extruding.label: Extruding tube
tube_extruding.description: Ventilation tube in the process of extrusion

tube_medial.label: Medialized tube
tube_medial.description: Tube displaced towards the middle ear cavity

myringitis.label: Myringitis
myringitis.description: Isolated inflammation of the tympanic membrane

myringitis_bullosa.label: Bullous myringitis
myringitis_bullosa.description: Vesicles or bullae on the surface of the tympanic membrane

myringitis_granulosa.label: Granular myringitis
myringitis_granulosa.description: Granulation tissue on the tympanic membrane

granulation.label: Granulation tissue
granulation.description: Granulation tissue on or through the membrane

polyp.label: Polyp
polyp.description: Aural polyp emerging from the middle ear through the membrane

granuloma.label: Granuloma
granuloma.description: Granuloma on the tympanic membrane or middle ear

tumor_middle_ear.label: Middle ear tumor
tumor_middle_ear.description: Tumor mass visible through or on the membrane

glomus_tympanicum.label: Glomus tympanicum
glomus_tympanicum.description: Pulsatile vascular mass visible behind the membrane (red/blue)

neomembrane.label: Neomembrane
neomembrane.description: Regenerated tympanic membrane, thin and translucent

scarring.label: Scarring
scarring.description: Scar tissue on the tympanic membrane

cerumen.label: Cerumen on TM
cerumen.description: Cerumen in contact with the tympanic membrane

foreign_body.label: Foreign body on TM
foreign_body.description: Foreign body in contact with the tympanic membrane

opaque.label: Opacity
opaque.description: Opaque tympanic membrane, without normal translucency

loss_light_reflex.label: Loss of light reflex
loss_light_reflex.description: Absence of the normal light reflex of the membrane

vascular_injection.label: Vascular injection
vascular_injection.description: Prominent vessels on the surface of the membrane

neovascularization.label: Neovascularization
neovascularization.description: Abnormal new blood vessels on the membrane

ossicular_erosion.label: Ossicular erosion
ossicular_erosion.description: Signs of ossicular chain erosion visible by transparency

stapes_visible.label: Stapes visible
stapes_visible.description: Stapes visible due to retraction or perforation

promontory_visible.label: Promontory visible
promontory_visible.description: Promontory visible due to severe retraction or perforation

incus_necrosis.label: Incus necrosis
incus_necrosis.description: Signs of necrosis of the long process of the incus

malleus_lateral.label: Lateralized malleus
malleus_lateral.description: Lateral position of the malleus handle

retraction_pocket.label: Retraction pocket
retraction_pocket.description: Deep retraction pocket with possible debris accumulation

adhesive_otitis.label: Adhesive otitis
adhesive_otitis.description: Membrane completely adherent to middle ear structures

cae_cerumen.label: Cerumen
cae_cerumen.description: Presence of cerumen in the ear canal

cae_cerumen_impacted.label: Impacted cerumen
cae_cerumen_impacted.description: Impacted cerumen completely obstructing the canal

cae_edema.label: Edema
cae_edema.description: Edema of the ear canal skin

cae_otitis_externa_diffuse.label: Diffuse otitis externa
cae_otitis_externa_diffuse.description: Diffuse inflammation of the canal skin

cae_otitis_externa_necrotizing.label: Necrotizing otitis externa
cae_otitis_externa_necrotizing.description: Malignant otitis externa with tissue necrosis

cae_furuncle.label: Furuncle
cae_furuncle.description: Furuncle in the cartilaginous portion of the canal

cae_erythema.label: Erythema
cae_erythema.description: Erythema of the ear canal skin

cae_otorrhea_fetid.label: Fetid otorrhea
cae_otorrhea_fetid.description: Foul-smelling discharge suggestive of cholesteatoma or anaerobes

cae_psoriasis.label: Psoriasis
cae_psoriasis.description: Psoriatic lesions in the ear canal

cae_seborrheic.label: Seborrheic dermatitis
cae_seborrheic.description: Seborrheic dermatitis of the ear canal

cae_keratosis.label: Keratosis
cae_keratosis.description: Keratosis obturans of the ear canal

cae_otomycosis.label: Otomycosis
cae_otomycosis.description: Fungal infection of the ear canal

cae_foreign_body.label: Foreign body
cae_foreign_body.description: Foreign body in the ear canal

cae_stenosis_acquired.label: Acquired stenosis
cae_stenosis_acquired.description: Stenosis due to previous surgery or chronic inflammation

cae_atresia.label: Atresia
cae_atresia.description: Absence or closure of the ear canal

cae_collapse.label: Collapse
cae_collapse.description: Collapse of the cartilaginous portion of the canal

cae_bleeding.label: Bleeding
cae_bleeding.description: Active bleeding from the canal skin

cae_granulation.label: Granulation
cae_granulation.description: Granulation tissue in the ear canal

cae_tumor.label: Canal tumor
cae_tumor.description: Tumor mass in the ear canal

cae_mastoid_cavity.label: Mastoid cavity
cae_mastoid_cavity.description: Radical or modified radical mastoidectomy cavity

cae_herpes_zoster.label: Herpetic vesicles (Herpes Zoster)
cae_herpes_zoster.description: Grouped vesicles on the external auditory canal or auricle due to varicella-zoster virus reactivation (Ramsay Hunt syndrome / otic shingles)

cae_hyperemia.label: EAC hyperemia
cae_hyperemia.description: Diffuse erythema of the external auditory canal skin due to increased vascularity

cae_microtia_i.label: Microtia grade I
cae_microtia_i.description: Smaller auricle with recognizable structures and near-normal shape; the EAC may be open with mild stenosis or present atresia

cae_microtia_ii.label: Microtia grade II
cae_microtia_ii.description: Small and deformed auricle (cup-shaped or constricted ear), lacking most superior structures; the EAC is usually narrowed or closed

cae_microtia_iii.label: Microtia grade III
cae_microtia_iii.description: Only a peanut-shaped cartilaginous remnant or small lobule is present, with no recognizable structures; almost always associated with complete aural atresia

cae_microtia_iv.label: Microtia grade IV (Anotia)
cae_microtia_iv.description: Complete absence of the auricle, usually associated with external auditory canal atresia

cae_agenesis_a.label: Agenesis type A (Stenosis)
cae_agenesis_a.description: Narrowing of the external auditory canal with intact skin

cae_agenesis_b.label: Agenesis type B (Medial stenosis)
cae_agenesis_b.description: Severe narrowing of the EAC with radish-tail morphology or atretic plate in its medial portion

cae_agenesis_c.label: Agenesis type C (Bony atresia)
cae_agenesis_c.description: Complete absence of the external auditory canal with bony atresia, frequently associated with middle ear malformations
